description: Phase 2B reproducible benchmark suite for educational OPC behavior validation.

cases.title: ISO Line Dose Monotonicity (DUV Immersion)
cases.intent: CD should decrease monotonically as dose threshold increases.

cases.title: ISO Line Extinction at High Dose (DUV Dry)
cases.intent: High threshold should produce no-print behavior at fixed geometry.

cases.title: Contact Width Monotonicity (DUV Dry)
cases.intent: Increasing contact width should not reduce printed CD.

cases.title: Contact Serif Response (DUV Dry)
cases.intent: Increasing serif size should increase effective printed CD.

cases.title: Staircase Dose Monotonicity (DUV Dry)
cases.intent: Staircase CD should decrease monotonically as dose increases.

cases.title: Guardrail Non-Print for Small ISO (DUV Dry)
cases.intent: Sub-guard mask dimensions should be treated as non-print.

cases.title: EUV Contact Dose Stability
cases.intent: EUV contact should remain printable over moderate dose sweep.

cases.title: Batch API Point Count Contract
cases.intent: Batch count and point array length should match expected sweep size.

cases.title: Batch Contour Decimation Contract
cases.intent: Contour payload should obey configured max point cap.

cases.title: Dense L/S EUV Presence Check
cases.intent: Representative dense pattern should print in expected CD range.
